trans-unit.target: TEXT_KINGVA199_05459_SYSTEM_100_000<tab>In order to undertake this quest, you must first meet the following requirements:
TEXT_KINGVA199_05459_SYSTEM_110_000<tab>1. FINAL FANTASY XIV: Dawntrail must be registered to your service account. 2. You must have completed the quest “A Spellbindng Read.”
TEXT_KINGVA199_05459_SYSTEM_120_000<tab>3. You must be a Disciple of War or Magic of level 100 or above. Limited jobs are not permitted.
TEXT_KINGVA199_05459_SHORTHANDDOLL_000_000<tab>GrEeTiNgS, aDvEnTuReR! tHaNk YoU fOr YoUr HeLp WiTh ThE oDd JoBs. I aM mEmOlIvIa, AnD mY rOlE iS tO rEcOrD yOuR eXpEdItIoNs.
TEXT_KINGVA199_05459_SHORTHANDDOLL_000_001<tab>Do YoU hAvE a StOrY tO tElL mE?
TEXT_KINGVA199_05459_SHORTHANDDOLL_000_002<tab>WrItInG dOwN yOuR eVeRy WoRd...TrImMiNg UnNeCeSsArY dEtAiLs.

TEXT_KINGVA199_05459_SHORTHANDDOLL_000_003<tab>YoUr JoUrNeY iNtO tHe PaGeS oF <var 1A 02 /var>tHe MeRcHaNt'S tAlE<var 1A 01 /var> hAs BeEn ReCoRdEd! FeEl FrEe To ReAd It─YoU sHaLl FiNd NaRy A mIsTaKe, I gUaRaNtEe It!
TEXT_KINGVA199_05459_SYSTEM_000_004<tab>Memolivia's highly condensed version of your report contains only accounts of your fiercest battles.
TEXT_KINGVA199_05459_SHORTHANDDOLL_000_005<tab>If YoU wIsH tO rEcOrD fUrThEr JoUrNeYs, My PeN iS aT tHe ReAdY!
TEXT_KINGVA199_05459_SYSTEM_110_005<tab>Variant dungeons (advanced) contain no exploration, only a series of bosses from the corresponding variant dungeon.
TEXT_KINGVA199_05459_SYSTEM_120_005<tab>The order of bosses is determined by the players, and each boss may be fought repeatedly until victory is achieved.
TEXT_KINGVA199_05459_SYSTEM_130_005<tab>Additional information is available in the bottom left of the V&C Dungeon Finder.
